creator: Aboriginal Press Books/Intelligent Aboriginal Publishing
description: This is not a book about Martin Heidegger, (1889-1976) nor is it a study of his written philosophy. This is instead a collection of previously published APNS editorials examining how otherwise intelligent people and entire educated societies can descend into political madness in the name of nationalism, race and the free-market social order.
